overview: EveryMoment is a mobile-first, web-based platform for capturing, organizing, and sharing event-centric memories. Users create Moments (weddings, parties, milestones) where media, people, and interactions are organized in one place with robust access control, social features, direct messaging, notifications, and a modern minimal UI.
features: Create and manage events (Moments) with media, attendees, and conversations
Event capacity limits with automatic waitlist promotion
Owner announcements broadcast to all RSVPs
Export moments to Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or .ics
In-app notifications for follows, RSVPs, mentions, and messages
Activity feed showing followed users' actions
Privacy settings: private profile and hide attending list
Profile stats: hosted count, attended count, followers, following
QR code event passes for attendees
